settings.banners_help: Add as many banners as you like. Each one has its own content and can be shown in every discussion, or only in the discussions and tags you choose.
settings.placement_help: Above the first post, below the last post, or repeated after every few posts.
settings.stream_every_help: The banner appears after every Nth post in a discussion. Minimum 2.
settings.label_help: The short uppercase line at the top of the banner, for example "Info" or "From our sponsor". Leave blank for none.
settings.content_help: The banner body. HTML is allowed and is sanitized before display.
settings.scope_help: Show this banner everywhere, or pick the discussions and tags it belongs in. Add a second banner with different text for a different discussion.
settings.scope_except: All discussions except the ones I choose
settings.scope_empty_only: Nothing is selected yet, so this banner will not appear anywhere.
settings.scope_empty_except: Nothing is selected yet, so this banner appears everywhere.
settings.target_search_placeholder: Search discussions, or paste a discussion link or ID
settings.color_help: Colors the banner border, background tint, and small heading. Leave blank to use your theme color. Body text always follows the theme so it stays readable in light and dark modes.
settings.icon_help: An optional icon shown beside the banner text: upload a small image or pick an emoji.
